_comment: Single source of truth for the omni vision wall (hitthe.link/vision). Add a device = one entry, no code change. 'room' is the security gate: unguessable vdo.ninja room id, must match the device's publisher. NOTE: vdo.ninja normalizes stream ids to [A-Za-z0-9_] (hyphens become underscores) — so rooms here use underscores to match exactly on both push and view. Set enabled:false to hide a tile. Publisher autostart points kiosk Chrome at /vision/pub.html?dev=<dev>.
